link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.
llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Vietnam. Descriptions are short previews. Fetch detail_path only for shortlisted roles. For role-specific searches, use data/intent-map.json or the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly from job.url and never generate basf.jobs links.
